audit_items.proof_trace: The release function only frees the main struct but not the dynamically allocated targets_arr field. The error path in damon_sysfs_context_add_dirs() (line 1798) calls kobject_put() without prior cleanup, causing a memory leak when targets_arr was allocated via nr_targets_store().
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker writes to /sys/.../nr_targets to trigger targets_arr allocation, then causes damon_sysfs_context_set_schemes() to fail, triggering the error path that leaks the allocated memory.
